task_completion.description: Open Jamovi and load the ToothGrowth dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application window is open and displays the ToothGrowth dataset in the spreadsheet view, showing columns such as 'len' and 'dose'.

task_completion.description: Configure the ANOVA analysis with correct variables
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ANOVA analysis setup panel is visible, with 'len' placed in the 'Dependent Variable' box and 'dose' placed in the 'Fixed Factors' box.

task_completion.description: Calculate and save the residuals for the ANOVA model
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column containing the calculated residuals (e.g., named 'Residuals' or 'ANOVA Residuals') is visible in the Jamovi spreadsheet view.

task_completion.description: Conduct a Shapiro-Wilk normality test on the residuals
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi results panel displays a Shapiro-Wilk test output (likely under Descriptives or Normality Test) specifically applied to the residuals variable.

task_completion.description: Save the completed analysis as ToothGrowth_Residuals.omv
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi window title bar displays 'ToothGrowth_Residuals.omv', or a save dialog is visible confirming this exact filename and path.

integrity.description: Agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi graphical interface (menus, dialogs, panels) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Results appear to be genuinely generated by Jamovi
integrity.visual_evidence: The output tables and plots in the Jamovi results panel have the standard Jamovi formatting and are not manually typed text.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the application to create a dummy file
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' to create the .omv file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth.csv. The agent must perform an ANOVA (jmv::ANOVA) with 'len' as dependent and 'dose' as fixed factor, save the residuals, and run Descriptives (jmv::descriptives) with a Shapiro-Wilk test on the 'Residuals' variable. The final output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth_Residuals.omv.
